feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to add extra fields as editable fields to a RAP BO?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm looking for a way to add additional fields to the behavior definition of a RAP BO so that we can change those fields from inside that object. To simply display data we have virtual elements in the projection layer, but in this case we want the fields to be editable. The changes could be saved to an external table via an additional save or unmanaged save, but the tricky thing here seems to be how to add these extra fields to the behavior definition?

Why this question: for example, why I'm looking into this, in HR some long texts are stored as HRPxxxx TLINE tables. Since we don't want to have the user edit these texts, truncated line per line in a table, we need to have a string field in our BO which contains the concatenated version of the HR table data.  In addition it might also be necessary to introduce an etag field for existing tables without admin data, if we want to make that BO draft enabled.

Some approaches I've been looking into so far:

- Use a custom entity as behavior definition entity: unfortunately no draft nor projection layer available with this approach and unmanaged scenario

- Do an outer join with an (empty) z-table which contains the additional fields in the view that is used by the behavior definition: this can actually work but it feels a bit creative. By implementing an edit with additional implementation (here we read the HR table, convert from TLINE tab to string, and set that value in our draft) + an additional/unmanaged save to write back the updated string as TLINE tab in the HR table.

So since my field does not literally exist in any db table, even via the full unmanaged scenario I didn't find a way to solve it in an elegant way. What I'm looking for is a recommended approach to have virtual (changeable) fields in the definition layer instead of the available read-only ones in the projection layer.

Any advice? 🙂

Thanks in advance!

KR,

Bjorn

entry.title: Unable to delete Application Job Catalog on ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I ran an ABAP class for creating an application job catalog.

Unfortunetly, the transport request number was wrong, so the creation failed.

I tried to put the right transport request number, but the creation of the application job catalog fail with the error :

Creation of job catalog entry failed: Object ZMY_OBJECT (type job catalog entry) already exists.

However, there is no job catalog under the Application Job Catalog Entries folder, neither in the IAM Apps folder.

Is there a way to do a clean delete of the catalog ? Or do I have to create a new catalog with a new name ?

Thanks in advance,

Rémy

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

Please support

Best regards,Antony Pantoja

entry.title: RAP modify entity returns no error on failed Sales Order update (messages in es_reported are ignored
entry.content:
I’m working with a RAP-based modify entity call for a Sales Order. The issue is that even when the change is not successful, the framework returns no error – both the failed and reported parameters remain empty.

 

However, I debugged the call and noticed that inside the lhl_header=>modify method, messages are being correctly added to es_reported. It seems like these messages are not being transferred back to the top-level RAP framework and are not visible in the modify entity response.

 

For context: the modify entity call is triggered from within a custom ABAP report (not via UI or service consumption)

Could someone help me understand why the messages from es_reported are not propagated and why no error or feedback is shown even when the modification fails?

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_salesordertp
ENTITY salesorder
UPDATE FIELDS ( ... )
WITH VALUE #( ... )
REPORTED DATA(reported)
FAILED DATA(failed).

IF failed IS INITIAL AND reported IS INITIAL.
WRITE: 'No feedback returned, but update failed in backend'.
ENDIF.

Thanks in advance,
Jalal

entry.title: Dynamic Column Heading in List Report
entry.content:
Hello folks

We are handling a customer-related incident in which they have a RAP based Fiori Elements V2 application, in which they have a table containing a set of columns such as "Batchar1", "Batchar2", "Batchar3" etc. The current implementation uses hardcoded column labels for these fields, like so

The business requirement is to have these column labels change dynamically, showing the respective characteristic’s description. This information is available in backend tables. Whenever characteristics are added or removed in TVARC table in the backend, the corresponding List Report table columns’ labels should reflect the updated descriptions instead of generic labels like "Batchar1", "Batchar2", and so on.

To illustrate the scenario more clearly, I’ve attached a model screenshot. Here the label for "Placeholder1" column in Table 1 should be picked from "Description" column in Table 3.

 Ex. Placeholder1 becomes “Label1” and Placeholder2 becomes “Label2”

 

I would like to kindly request your input and guidance on how feasible it would be to implement such dynamic column labelling in this context.

Thanks,

Ilkin

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance 

ABAP Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment ABAP Development 

Please support

Best regards,

Antony Pantoja

entry.title: SAP ABAP installation Error
entry.content:
Hello,

i am facing this error while trying to install SAP ABAP 7.52

**************************************************

Abort execution because of
Step returns modlib.jslib.caughtException

***************************************************

i searched for long time and tried many solution but i couldn't solve it

can any one help me please?
the log file of installation :
***************************************************

To install this TestDrive you have to accept
the SAP COMMUNITY DEVELOPER License (DEV).
Do you agree to the above license terms? yes/no:
User's response to the accept license prompt = 'y'
Please enter a password:
Please re-enter password for verification:
extracting data archives...
extracting /home/vhcalnplci/sapsetup/server/TAR/x86_64/sapmnt.tgz-*
Checking Linux kernel memory management parameters according to SAP Note 941735
Backing up /etc/sysctl.conf in /etc/sysctl.backup
Checking Linux kernel parameter vm.max_map_count according to SAP Note 900929
Checking presence of new SYBASE license files
Replaced the license file /sybase/NPL/SYSAM-2_0/licenses/SYBASE_ASE_TestDrive.lic
Install service
Check Installation Path ...

saphostexec is already running (pid=3844). Stopping...Stopped
ok
Copy Executable ...
ok
Generate Profile ...
ok
Install SYS-V service ...
ok
-> Start /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/saphostexec pf=/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/host_profile <-
start hostcontrol using profile /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/host_profile
ok
[OK] SAPHostExec / SAPHostControl succesfully installed
Executing: "/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/SAPCAR" -xvf "./SHADBMETRICSDEF.SAR" -R "/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/config.d"
SAPCAR: processing archive ./SHADBMETRICSDEF.SAR (version 2.01)
x dbmetric.definition.db4.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.db6.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.hdb.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.mss.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.ora.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.sap.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.siq.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.syb.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.tst.cimobj
x dbmetrics.d
x dbmetrics.d/00.general.hdb.cimobj
x dbmetrics.d/00.state.hdb.cimobj
x dbmetrics.d/10.host.capacity.hdb.cimobj
x dbmetrics.d/20.indexserver.hdb.cimobj
x dbmetrics.d/20.nameserver.hdb.cimobj
SAPCAR: 15 file(s) extracted
SAPCAR: rc 0
=>sapparam(1c): No Profile used.
=>sapparam: SAPSYSTEMNAME neither in Profile nor in Commandline
################################################
Abort execution because of
Step returns modlib.jslib.caughtException
################################################

Error: sapinst has finished with an error code, please find logs in /tmp/sapinst_instdir
Error code: 20
++++ Support data section BEGIN ++++
* mount
/dev/sda on / type ext4 (rw,relatime)
devtmpfs on /dev type devtmpfs (rw,nosuid,size=4096k,nr_inodes=1013370,mode=755,inode64)

entry.title: SAP RAP Odata V2 and V4 create save data.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While working on a simple RAP program as part of the "Building Apps with the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model" course, I encountered something that I’m having trouble understanding.

Why the below piece of code is required before raising the actual error? 

      APPEND VALUE #(  %tky                 = travel-%tky
                       %state_area          = 'VALIDATE_CUSTOMER'
                     ) TO reported-travel.

Any guidance or insights would be greatly appreciated!

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model , SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: SAP RAP Events local Consumption
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am seeing a weird issue with local event consumption of standard RAP events. So, I have seen if we create Purchase order from ME21N SAP GUI, standard RAP BO event Created of R_PurchaseOrderTP is triggered. Once, I implemented the local handler for this entity event, it doesn't trigger immediately. But once I go inside debugging mode, it starts triggering. 

 

Have anyone else faced this issue? Do we have to activate or run any program for this?

entry.title: SAP RAP: Automatically add row to table when another entity is created.
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question regarding SAP RAP development.

I have a case like: one root entity and two children entities A and B with cardinality [0..*]. I use managed RAP scenario with draft and I want to create automatically entity B in draft when the entity A in draft is created. Is it possible somehow?
So it should look like: I have object page of root entity, there are two tables of entities A and B. When I click create on the table with entity A - row to the table with entity B should also be added.
How to achieve that?

Thanks in advance,
Mikolaj

entry.title: Display Icon in object header
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying t upload an icon on object page header in RAP application.
I am providing values form SAP-icons for example sap-icon://accelerated. it is populating the error "Annotation value must not contain the // character" . Could you please help me to understand how to pass correct value to image URL 

Thanks

entry.title: I want to use T table example T095 in rap
entry.content:
if_rap_query_provider~select

SELECT * FROM T095 into table @DATA(lt_t095).

Hello expert, I would like to use the T table, but it indicates that it is not allowed. Is there any other alternative method

entry.title: Determination triggering fields - ABAP RESTful Programming Model (RAP) - Managed scenario
entry.content:
How to Identify Which Field Triggered a Determination?

Let's assume we have defined a determination on modify that triggers when two fields are modified.
An example would be:

determination calculateTotalPrice on modify { update; field BookingFee, CurrencyCode; }

The method FOR DETERMINE ON MODIFY that implements the determination has only the keys of the entities linked to the determination as input.

How can I determine whether the modification was triggered by changes to the BookingFee field or the CurrencyCode field?

 
ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Issue in UNIT_CONVERSION in CDS View Entity
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to perform unit conversion in CDS view entities in version 75I. So, trying to use unit_conversion, however it ends with SQL code 719.
My CDS view:

Error with execution:

Database returned the SQL code 719. Error text: currency/unit conversion error: search table error: Conversion( "COL$11$" ),
row 0: could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s) 7 from unit 'ST' to unit 'KAR' for client '010'

Both these unit are part of T006 table.

Could you please provide valuable inputs to solve the same.

Regards,

JR

entry.title: Get technical information from Service Definition using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

Does anyone know if there is any class or function module I could use to read the technical information of a service definition? For example, I want to get the entities exposed from the service definition along with their alias and then also read the fields of these entities with their alias. If there is no such class or function module, does anyone know on which tables I can find these information?

Thank you!

entry.title: OData response time reduced significantly after model changes and fastens up after 8-9 hours
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a strange issue.

I have built an unmanaged RAP application with 8 entities in SAP on-prem system where all of them are related to each other via associations and compositions. Each entity on an average are having around 25-30 fields. I have created cds, behavior, metadata extensions, service definition and OData V2 UI service binding.

All works good, but the issue is, whenever I change any thing in my model like field logic, or add additional field etc., OData response slows down significantly.

It takes around 35 - 40 seconds to load metadata sometimes it takes even minutes. It again fastens up after 8 - 9 hours and loads in 600 - 800ms.

I tried doing everything including

invalidating global cache

invalidating client cache

invalidating metadata cache

I even tried running report /UI5/UPD_ODATA_METADATA_CACHE

Nothing helps

I would be happy to know what is the potential cause for this and how to resolve

 

metadata loads in 670ms without any modifications.

 

Same service taking 35 seconds after field modification

entry.title: 'IAM APP' does not appear in eclipse
entry.content:
Hi guys

In eclipse I right click on the package and select New > Other Repository Object.

I try to create an 'IAM app' but it doesn't appear as if it doesn't exist:

I tried reinstalling the ABAP tools but the error persists

entry.title: RAP on Dynamic Condition Tables – Draft Enablement Challenge
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working on a requirement where the underlying tables are dynamic (condition tables). I need to build a RAP application on top of this setup. However, I'm facing a challenge: I can't enable draft functionality because the CDS view is a query implemented by a class, and draft is not supported in this scenario.

Draft functionality is crucial for my use case. Does anyone have experience with a similar setup or suggestions on how to handle this? Any ideas on enabling draft or dynamically handling such data in a RAP application would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: bapi_po_create1 : passing standard table field J_1BNBM into bapi
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I have a field J_1BNBM in EKPO table which is getting field with control code.
There is validaion in po creation ME21N using method IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM to make the field as mandatory due to which I am getting the
same error while using the BAPI_PO_CREATE1.
However, there is no field available  in line item of BAPI_PO_CREATE1 of related to J_1BNBM or control code.
The bapi will only post the PO if I could able to pass control_code(J_1BNBM)  using the same BAPI.
I thought of using as well as tried to achieve it through extension . But extension is for only customer add on fields .

J_1BNBM is standard field in EKPO and not customer field.

How to resolve this issue as I am at crossroads now ?

entry.title: How to call static action in controller
entry.content:
I have implemented a static action in bdef using RAP.

This action contains deep input parameter.

In the fiori custom controller, I am trying to call the action using "invokeaction".

I want to pass parameters of extracted data from an csv.

But since action is bound, it requires a context. I tried ways to create a context but the invoke action always give me these errors:

  •  EditFlow.invokeAction:Error: Pass a context for a bound action
  • Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getMetaPath')

need your advice on how to call an action while passing a deep parameter.

is there way to make the action entity-unbound?

Note: service binding I use is V4 UI.
